ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "cogs" REAL /* Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) of the company */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit of the company */,
  "sga" REAL /* Selling, General, and Administrative (SGA) expenses of the company */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings Per Share (EPS) of the company */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization (EBITDA) of the company */,
  "ebit" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest and Taxes (EBIT) of the company */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statement) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial statement */,
  "fiscal_quarter" INTEGER /* Fiscal quarter of the financial statement */,
  "reporting_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial statement is reported */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Audit status of the financial statement */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the financial statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry that the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector that the company belongs to */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "ceo_email" TEXT /* Email of the CEO */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the company's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industry ("industry_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheets" (
  "balance_sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement that the balance sheet belongs to */,
  "cash_and_equivalents" REAL /* Cash and equivalents of the company */,
  "receivables" REAL /* Receivables of the company */,
  "inventory" REAL /* Inventory of the company */,
  "current_assets" REAL /* Current assets of the company */,
  "long_term_assets" REAL /* Long-term assets of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "current_debt" REAL /* Current debt of the company */,
  "current_liabilities" REAL /* Current liabilities of the company */,
  "long_term_debt" REAL /* Long-term debt of the company */,
  "long_term_liabilities" REAL /* Long-term liabilities of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "shareholders_equity" REAL /* Shareholders' equity of the company */,
  "goodwill" REAL /* Goodwill of the company */,
  "intangible_assets" REAL /* Intangible assets of the company */,
  "deferred_tax_assets" REAL /* Deferred tax assets of the company */,
  "deferred_tax_liabilities" REAL /* Deferred tax liabilities of the company */,
  "other_assets" REAL /* Other assets of the company */,
  "other_liabilities" REAL /* Other liabilities of the company */,
  "noncontrolling_interests" REAL /* Noncontrolling interests of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the balance sheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow_statements" (
  "cash_flow_statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash flow statement */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement that the cash flow statement belongs to */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation of the company */,
  "operating_cash_flow" REAL /* Operating cash flow of the company */,
  "capital_expenditure" REAL /* Capital expenditures of the company */,
  "investing_cash_flow" REAL /* Investing cash flow of the company */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid by the company */,
  "financing_cash_flow" REAL /* Financing cash flow of the company */,
  "free_cash_flow" REAL /* Free cash flow of the company */,
  "net_change_in_cash" REAL /* Net change in cash of the company */,
  "cash_at_beginning_of_period" REAL /* Cash at the beginning of the period */,
  "cash_at_end_of_period" REAL /* Cash at the end of the period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the cash flow statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_flow_statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flow_statements_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial statement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the financial statement */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)
